title: fierimod
description: the gui fieri biome, mob, and a few fieri related items
body:
Welcome one, welcome all! Witness this disaster of a mod that will prevent most minecraft progress! Play the game with a new added Guy Fieri creature which you can kill for a surprise, venture through minecraft normally until you decide to conquer the Fierimension with a dirt block portal and the Fierimension Key, and maybe even grab a quick bite *of* Guy Fieri. You can also explore the Guy Fieriome, or don't, you will stumble across it at some point. With the guy fieri drop you are able to craft a new armor set and smelt a new food that restores tons of hp. There is also a new potion added where you are able to brew fieri into a strength and speed potion to dominate your foes. Just watch out using a hoe on the guy fieri block...

[Known Bugs]
None As of Now

[Known Conflicting Mods]
None

I can be reached at unofficialguyfieriemail@gmail.com for any questions or concerns.
